Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Complete capstone proposal enhancement and research paper analysis

Main Tasks Completed:
- Enhanced proposal draft with proper APA references and academic writing
- Created comprehensive research papers list (Section B)
- Created detailed research papers summary (Section C)
- Generated Claude project summary for future reference

New Files:
- Enhanced_Proposal_A1.docx: Professionally written proposal with APA citations
- Enhanced_Proposal_Draft.md: Markdown version of enhanced proposal
- Section_B_Research_Papers_List.md: Table of all 13 research papers with relevance ratings
- Section_C_Research_Papers_Summary.md: Detailed analysis of each paper
- Claude_Project_Summary.md: Project context and progress tracker

Key Improvements to Proposal:
- Expanded from 3 paragraphs to comprehensive 6-section document
- Added 13 properly formatted APA references from research papers
- Fleshed out problem statement with economic context (DRAM crisis)
- Detailed multi-objective challenge (utilization, SLAs, fairness, isolation)
- Proposed mathematical programming solution approach
- Maintained academic tone while preserving user''s voice

Research Papers Analyzed:
1. Overcommitment in Cloud Providers (Zhi, 2025)
2. Memory Management Survey (Mishra & Kulkarni, 2018)
3. Coach Resource Oversubscription (Reidys et al.)
4. Dominant Resource Fairness (Ghodsi et al., 2011)
5. VMware ESX Memory Management (Waldspurger, 2002)
6. Resource Central (Cortez et al., 2017)
7. SLA-aware Server Utilization (Blagodurov et al.)
8. VMMB Memory Balancing (Min et al., 2012)
9. ML-based Resource Allocation (Wang & Yang, 2025)
10. Application Overload Mitigation (Hu et al., 2025)
11. Server Memory Optimization (Krishnaiah & Rao, 2025)
12. Enhanced VM Optimization (Doukha & Ez-zahout, 2025)
13. CPU/RAM Energy-Based SLA

EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive bin packing architecture and flowcharts to proposal

Major Enhancements:
- Added .gitignore to exclude .claude/ and .vscode/ folders
- Expanded proposal from 4,000 to 11,000+ words with detailed architecture
- Introduced decoupled bin packing and admission control architecture
- Added 3 comprehensive ASCII flowchart diagrams

Key Architecture Additions:

1. VM Bin Packing Context:
   - Clarified that bin packing is handled by cluster manager
   - Our model serves as consultant to cluster manager
   - Agnostic to specific bin packing algorithm used

2. Dual Prediction Model System:
   - Generalized model: Uses cross-VM trends (like Coach paper)
   - Curated model: Learns individual VM behavior over time
   - Progressive transition from generalized to curated

3. VM Admission Control Process:
   - Cluster manager selects candidate node via bin packing
   - Node''s admission control model analyzes temporal conflicts
   - Returns accept/reject decision
   - If rejected, cluster manager tries alternative node

4. Continuous Monitoring & Overload Management:
   - Proactive overload prediction
   - Early reclamation (ballooning, page sharing, compression)
   - SLA-based termination prioritization
   - Termination groups by priority level
   - Cluster manager relaunches terminated VMs

5. Flowchart Diagrams Added:
   - VM Admission Control Flow
   - Continuous Monitoring & Overload Management
   - Dual Prediction Model Architecture

Technical Details:
- Mathematical programming framework formalization
- Decision variables, constraints, objective functions
- Research scope clearly defined (in-scope vs future work)
- Integration with complementary techniques from literature

New Files:
- .gitignore
- Enhanced_Proposal_A1_Final.docx (comprehensive version)

Updated Files:
- Enhanced_Proposal_Draft.md (now 485 lines vs 107 lines)

References Added:
- Hu et al. (2025) for process-level termination
- Additional context from all 13 research papers

🤖 Generated with Claude Code (https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
